selected_markets.title: Will the high temp in Chicago be <46° on Feb 14, 2026?
Will the **high temp in Austin** be 74-75° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: Mid-probability of 0.88 adjusted downward by enrich_bias (0.0408). Chicago in mid-February typically sees highs well below 46°F, making this outcome highly likely. Good volume (659) supports market efficiency. Confidence moderate due to weather unpredictability.

Mid-probability of 0.015 adjusted downward by enrich_bias (0.0408). Austin in mid-February typically sees highs in the 60-70°F range; a narrow band of 74-75°F is unlikely. Reasonable volume (476) but extreme specificity of temperature range reduces confidence.
